Buruja Mushaf
Loading…
Buruja : Tajweed Mushaf. A calm place to read the whole Qur'an, with the rules of recitation shown in colour. Arabic is the verified Uthmani text (quran.com, via Buruja's grounded pipeline); tajweed rules are the open KFGQPC tagging; recitation is Mishary Alafasy. The colouring and design are our own, not a copy of any printed mushaf. Reset reading position.

The colours

Each colour marks a rule of tajweed, telling you how to shape the sound.

Tap any verse to listen
Mishary Alafasy · tap a verse or press play
